utility_evaluation.REASONING: There are 5 items in the required format: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, total_budget. In the final coverage plan, all 5 items appear. Check full specification: (1) health_coverage: explicitly includes both physical and mental health insurance with individual monthly costs and coverage details—meets requirement. (2) property_coverage: home/contents insurance with monthly cost and coverage details—meets requirement. (3) travel_coverage: travel insurance with monthly cost and detailed coverage—meets requirement. (4) additional_services: includes enhancement service with cost and coverage—meets requirement. (5) total_budget: includes monthly and annual cost breakdown—meets requirement. All items are fully specified per the format.
